courses.name: Computational Thinking through Mechatronics
courses.desc: First exposure to procedural programming and mechatronics. Course credit exclusions: LE/EECS 1541 3.00.

courses.name: Introduction to Computing
courses.desc: Broad introduction to computing concepts and Python programming.

courses.name: Introduction to Object-Oriented Programming
courses.desc: Implements APIs and object-oriented design. Prerequisites: LE/EECS 1011 3.00 or LE/EECS 1012 3.00.

courses.name: Object-Oriented Data Structures and Algorithms
courses.desc: Data structures and algorithms in Java. Prerequisites: LE/EECS 1021 3.00; general EECS GPA prerequisite.

courses.name: Software Design
courses.desc: Software design patterns and architecture. Prerequisites: LE/EECS 2030 3.00.

courses.name: Software Team Project
courses.desc: Capstone team project integrating design, implementation, and delivery.
